name: USING (true) — no restriction
breach_precedent: Lovable CVE-2025-48757: missing RLS exposed 170+ apps.

name: auth.role() without auth.uid()
breach_precedent: Wiz research: found across 20% of vibe-coded apps.

name: auth.uid() IS NOT NULL — logical bypass
fix: Replace USING (auth.uid() IS NOT NULL) with USING (auth.uid() = user_id)
breach_precedent: Wiz: sneakiest RLS bypass — passes naive checks but lets any user see all data.

name: select('*') without user filter
fix: Add .eq('user_id', user.id) to filter by authenticated user.

name: getSession() on frontend
breach_precedent: Cursor research: getSession() reads from localStorage and can be spoofed.
